name: Curried Vegetable Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cooked peas or finely cut green beans
1 tablespoon flour mixed with 2 tablespoons cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese to room temperature.
2. Beat the cream cheese with honey and spices until smooth.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except crust and egg white.
4. Make pastry for a 2-crust pie; roll it 1/8-inch thick.
5. Cut 2 circles (3/4 to 3 inches) from the rolled pastry, rerolling as needed.
6. Spoon about 1 teaspoon of filling into the center of each circle.
7. Brush the edge of each circle with lightly beaten egg white or flour mixed with cold water.
8. Fold each circle in half and press the edges together using fork tines.
9. Deep fry the pastry half-circles for 2 to 3 minutes, turning them to brown both sides.
10. This yields about 30 dumplings.
